content: Next.js 16/React 19 frontend, MongoDB backend. Rich feature set (alerts, payments, watchlists, i18n). API-driven.

1. Backend: Adopt V2's FastAPI and SQLModel for the core data engine and crawlers. 2. Frontend: Retain V1's Next.js UI but refactor data fetching to point to the V2 FastAPI backend. 3. Features: Integrate V2's Institutional Terminal into V1's user portal.
Python/FastAPI backend, Monorepo structure. Advanced Async Crawler (v2), IDX Institutional Terminal designs. SQLModel/SQLAlchemy. Focus on data pipeline and institutional-grade features.
